creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I have added the following mailinglists to the documentation and the
website (www.FreeBSD.org/search) in the last couple of months:

- - freebsd-wireless
- - freebsd-chromium
- - freebsd-tilera
- - freebsd-toolchain
- - freebsd-sysinstall (not added by me, but also not there on
docs.FreeBSD.org/mail)

I did not add them on http://docs.freebsd.org/mail as I have no idea
where/how to add them.

Anyone out there who knows who could fix/change this?

Regards.


jkois

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
